nl_query: Which configurations at course scope override the global scope setting for the same configuration key, and show the course code, global value, course value, and the data type.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code, c1.config_value AS global_value, c2.config_value AS academic_unit_value, c1.data_type FROM academic_unit au JOIN configuration c1 ON au.id = c1.scope_id JOIN configuration c2 ON au.id = c2.scope_id WHERE c1.scope_type = 'GLOBAL' AND c2.scope_type = 'ACADEMIC_UNIT' AND c1.config_key = c2.config_key AND c1.scope_id IS NULL AND c2.scope_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY au.code
error: Validation failed (schema): Invalid value: configuration.scope_type = 'ACADEMIC_UNIT' is not a valid value for this column. Allowed values: BOARD, COURSE, GLOBAL. Tip — this column is constrained to a fixed set of values by a CHECK constraint; only the listed values can ever exist in the data.
